title: V4 thin compatibility and product-grade headless Runtime contract bundle
description: Machine-readable contracts for the existing thin POST /api/runtime compatibility endpoint and the V4 Runtime P0 headless target: persisted sessions, adapter event intents, server-generated Events, legal transitions, optimistic locking, recovery points, stable adapters, and UI-independent capability boundaries.

examples.input: 周末带孩子去室内活动
周末带孩子去室内活动

x-invalidExamples.reason: feedback and memoryDecision cannot appear in the same request

value.input: 周末带孩子去室内活动

x-invalidExamples.reason: field presence is mutually exclusive even when one value is null

value.input: 周末带孩子去室内活动

x-productGradeHeadlessBoundary.v5UiAccessRule: V5 UI must access Runtime only through RuntimeAdapter, Capability Contract, and Event Contract.

effectiveCapabilities.name: session_lifecycle
effectiveCapabilities.reason: No persisted session lifecycle operations are implemented.

effectiveCapabilities.name: state_machine
effectiveCapabilities.reason: The thin endpoint emits state-shaped responses but has no persisted Transition Engine.

effectiveCapabilities.name: event_stream
effectiveCapabilities.reason: Events exist only in the current response and cannot be queried as a persisted stream.

effectiveCapabilities.name: persistence
effectiveCapabilities.reason: Runtime session, Event, and Recovery Point repositories are not implemented.

effectiveCapabilities.name: recovery_point
effectiveCapabilities.reason: Recovery Point storage and creation are not implemented.

effectiveCapabilities.name: runtime_adapter
effectiveCapabilities.reason: The product-grade RuntimeAdapter is a frozen contract only.

effectiveCapabilities.name: capability_query
effectiveCapabilities.reason: No runtime capability query endpoint or adapter method is implemented.

x-runtimeP0Capabilities.consumerRule: Clients must use effectiveCapabilities.availability for enablement. targetCapabilities.status describes contract freeze state only.
